title: Add New Tasks
summary: Users can create new to-do items by entering a title. Each task starts in an incomplete state.

behaviorStatements.text: When a user submits a non-empty task title, the system shall add a new task to the list with the given title and an incomplete status.
behaviorStatements.trigger: user submits a non-empty task title
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall add a new task to the list with the given title and an incomplete status

behaviorStatements.text: When a user submits an empty task title, the system shall reject the submission and not add a task.
behaviorStatements.trigger: user submits an empty task title
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall reject the submission and not add a task
